sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70009" key="nebrw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεβρώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n70009.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fawn-like,</tr_> of Dionysus, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.524.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
